faq.q: How much does a WordPress website cost in Mexico?
faq.a: The price of a WordPress website in Mexico depends on scope: a self-managed corporate site typically starts in the low thousands of pesos, while a WooCommerce store or a custom system requires more investment. At Alrit.dev we quote based on your goals and give you a clear estimate at no cost and with no commitment.

faq.q: What is a self-managed website and how does it work with WordPress?
faq.a: A self-managed website is a site you can update yourself without knowing how to code. With WordPress you access a dashboard where you edit text, images, products and sections in minutes. We configure it custom for you and train you so you can manage your site with full autonomy.

faq.q: How do you make a WordPress site load fast?
faq.a: We apply WPO (Web Performance Optimization): image optimization, caching, lazy load, CDN, lightweight themes and clean code. This lets us reach PageSpeed 90+ and green Core Web Vitals, improving load speed, user experience and your Google ranking.

faq.q: How do you protect my WordPress from hacks?
faq.a: We strengthen security with server hardening, an SSL certificate, trusted security plugins, constant WordPress and plugin updates, and automatic backups. This minimizes the risk of hacks and, if anything happens, we can restore your site quickly.

faq.q: WordPress or Wix, which is better for my business?
faq.a: For a business looking to grow, WordPress beats Wix: it offers full control, better SEO, scalability, unlimited integrations and real ownership of your site. Wix is more limited and locks you into its platform. If you want a digital asset that ranks and grows with you, WordPress is the professional choice.

We don't hand you a generic template; we deliver a documented digital asset that's ready to grow.

faq.q: What is custom software?
faq.a: Custom software is a system built specifically for a company's processes, instead of an off-the-shelf program made for everyone. It is designed around how you actually work, automates your specific tasks and scales with you, which reduces errors and removes manual work.

faq.q: How much does custom software cost?
faq.a: The cost of custom software depends on scope: how many processes you automate, the integrations needed (like Mercado Pago or CFDI-SAT) and the number of users. At Alrit.dev we work in phases and deliver a fixed budget after a discovery call, so you know the price before we start.

faq.q: How long does it take to build custom software?
faq.a: A simple custom system can have a working MVP in a few weeks, while larger platforms take a few months. We work in phases and deliver a usable first version early, instead of waiting until the very end for you to see results.

faq.q: Should I choose custom software or an off-the-shelf ERP?
faq.a: An off-the-shelf ERP makes sense when your operation fits a common process and you accept adapting to it. Custom software makes sense when you have your own workflows, want to avoid ever-growing per-user licenses and need the system to fit your business. Often the best option is a custom system that integrates with the tools you already use.

sections.heading: How we work, phase by phase
sections.body: We start with a discovery phase where we define scope, key flows and the integrations of your iOS and Android mobile app. Then we move into UX/UI design and a clickable prototype so you can validate the experience before a single line of production code is written. We develop in increments, with testing and reviews alongside you at every milestone, and close with store publishing, training and a maintenance plan so the app grows with your business.

We integrate payments and collections through Mercado Pago, OXXO and SPEI, CFDI-SAT invoicing, and direct customer communication via WhatsApp Business. It's all designed so your app isn't an island, but a connected piece of your ERP, CRM or POS and the stack you already use every day.

sections.heading: Related cases and projects
sections.body: We built Conectas, a mobile app to discover and book experiences, where we solved search, discovery and the booking flow in a smooth experience for the end user. We also developed Programarte, a mental wellness app focused on supporting users through a careful, approachable interface. They're real examples of how we take an iOS and Android mobile app from idea to the stores, connected to the business and ready to use.

faq.q: ¿Cuánto cuesta automatizar un proceso en mi empresa?
faq.a: El costo depende de la complejidad del proceso y de cuántos sistemas se integran. Una automatización puntual (por ejemplo, capturar leads de un formulario en tu CRM y WhatsApp) suele ser una inversión accesible y de retorno rápido, mientras que orquestar varios procesos con agentes de IA es un proyecto mayor. En Alrit.dev te damos un diagnóstico gratuito con el alcance, el precio y el ROI estimado antes de empezar.

faq.q: ¿Qué es n8n y por qué lo recomiendan frente a Zapier o Make?
faq.a: n8n es una plataforma de automatización de flujos de trabajo que puedes alojar en tu propio servidor (self-hosted). A diferencia de Zapier, no cobra por número de tareas y te da control total de tus datos, ideal para cumplir con privacidad y para procesos de alto volumen. Make y Zapier son excelentes para integraciones rápidas en la nube; te ayudamos a elegir la herramienta correcta según tu caso, presupuesto y volumen.

faq.q: ¿Qué procesos puedo automatizar en mi negocio?
faq.a: Casi cualquier proceso repetitivo y basado en reglas: captura y calificación de prospectos, respuestas en WhatsApp, cobranza y recordatorios de pago, facturación CFDI, sincronización entre tu CRM y tu e-commerce, reportes automáticos, onboarding de clientes y notificaciones internas. Empezamos mapeando dónde tu equipo pierde más tiempo y automatizamos primero lo de mayor impacto.

faq.q: ¿Necesito conocimientos técnicos o cambiar mis sistemas actuales?
faq.a: No. Trabajamos sobre las herramientas que ya usas e integramos vía APIs y conectores, así que normalmente no necesitas cambiar nada. Nosotros diseñamos, construimos y monitoreamos los flujos, y te capacitamos para que tu equipo los use con confianza. Tú te enfocas en tu negocio.

faq.q: ¿Pueden integrar IA y agentes inteligentes en mis automatizaciones?
faq.a: Sí. Desarrollamos agentes de IA conectados a tus procesos reales: un agente que responde y califica prospectos en WhatsApp, otro que resume correos o documentos, o uno que clasifica tickets de soporte. Combinamos modelos de IA con n8n, Make o APIs para que la automatización no solo mueva datos, sino que también tome decisiones simples por ti.

sections.heading: Por qué automatizar tus procesos con Alrit.dev
sections.body: No vendemos plantillas genéricas ni recetas de YouTube: diseñamos cada automatización de procesos pensando en cómo factura, cobra y atiende realmente tu negocio en México. Combinamos ingeniería moderna con integración profunda al ecosistema local (CFDI-SAT, SPEI/OXXO, Mercado Pago, WhatsApp Business), y construimos flujos rápidos, estables y mantenibles en lugar de cadenas frágiles que solo entiende quien las armó. Trabajamos con precios transparentes en MXN y rangos honestos, sin promesas infladas de "todo automático para mañana".

sections.heading: Cómo trabajamos, fase por fase
sections.body: Arrancamos con un mapeo de tus procesos actuales para detectar dónde se pierde tiempo y dónde la automatización rinde más rápido. Luego diseñamos el flujo, lo construimos y lo probamos con datos reales, conectando las APIs e integraciones que necesites. Finalmente lo lanzamos a producción con monitoreo y manejo de errores, y te acompañamos en los ajustes para que la automatización de procesos siga funcionando conforme tu operación crece.

sections.heading: Tecnología e integraciones locales
sections.body: Construimos sobre n8n, Make y Zapier según el caso, sumando IA para clasificar, redactar o decidir dentro del flujo, y conectándonos vía API con las plataformas que ya usas. Lo que nos distingue es la integración con el ecosistema mexicano: timbrado y facturación CFDI ante el SAT, conciliación de pagos por SPEI, OXXO y Mercado Pago, y mensajería automatizada por WhatsApp Business. Cuando tu automatización necesita una pieza de software a la medida, la desarrollamos con Next.js/React o el stack que mejor encaje, sin atarte a límites de una sola herramienta.

sections.heading: Casos y proyectos relacionados
sections.body: Hemos ayudado a PyMEs a automatizar su cobranza, enviando recordatorios y dando seguimiento a pagos sin que alguien tenga que perseguir clientes uno por uno. También construimos flujos de facturación CFDI/SAT que generan y envían comprobantes de forma automática, y atención por WhatsApp Business que responde, califica y deriva conversaciones al área correcta. Son automatizaciones de procesos que liberan horas del equipo y reducen errores en tareas que antes se hacían a mano.

faq.q: How much does it cost to automate a process in my company?
faq.a: It depends on the complexity of the process and how many systems need to be integrated. A single automation (for example, capturing form leads into your CRM and WhatsApp) is usually an affordable, fast-return investment, while orchestrating several processes with AI agents is a larger project. At Alrit.dev we give you a free audit with the scope, price and estimated ROI before we start.

faq.q: What is n8n and why do you recommend it over Zapier or Make?
faq.a: n8n is a workflow automation platform you can host on your own server (self-hosted). Unlike Zapier, it doesn't charge per task and gives you full control of your data, which is ideal for privacy compliance and high-volume processes. Make and Zapier are great for fast cloud integrations; we help you choose the right tool based on your case, budget and volume.

faq.q: What processes can I automate in my business?
faq.a: Almost any rule-based, repetitive process: lead capture and qualification, WhatsApp replies, collections and payment reminders, invoicing, syncing your CRM with your e-commerce, automated reports, client onboarding and internal notifications. We start by mapping where your team loses the most time and automate the highest-impact tasks first.

faq.q: Do I need technical skills or to change my current systems?
faq.a: No. We work on top of the tools you already use and integrate via APIs and connectors, so you usually don't need to change anything. We design, build and monitor the workflows and train your team to use them with confidence. You stay focused on your business.

faq.q: Can you build AI and intelligent agents into my automations?
faq.a: Yes. We develop AI agents wired into your real processes: an agent that replies to and qualifies leads on WhatsApp, one that summarizes emails or documents, or one that classifies support tickets. We combine AI models with n8n, Make or APIs so your automation doesn't just move data, it also makes simple decisions for you.

sections.heading: What our process automation includes
sections.body: We connect your tools and remove repetitive manual work with custom flows built in n8n, Make or Zapier, orchestrated with AI and APIs. You get working integrations across your CRM, billing system, email and WhatsApp Business, plus documentation for every flow, error handling and retries, and a panel so you can see what's happening. Each automation ships ready for production, not as an experiment that breaks the first time something changes.

sections.heading: Why automate your processes with Alrit.dev
sections.body: We don't sell generic templates or YouTube recipes: we design every process automation around how your business actually bills, collects and serves customers in Mexico. We combine modern engineering with deep local integration (CFDI-SAT, SPEI/OXXO, Mercado Pago, WhatsApp Business), building flows that are fast, stable and maintainable instead of fragile chains only their author understands. We work with transparent pricing in MXN and honest ranges, with no inflated promises of "everything automated by tomorrow."

sections.heading: How we work, phase by phase
sections.body: We start by mapping your current processes to find where time is lost and where automation pays off fastest. Then we design the flow, build it and test it with real data, connecting the APIs and integrations you need. Finally we launch to production with monitoring and error handling, and we stay with you on the adjustments so your process automation keeps working as your operation grows.

sections.heading: Technology and local integrations
sections.body: We build on n8n, Make and Zapier depending on the case, adding AI to classify, draft or decide inside the flow, and connecting via API to the platforms you already use. What sets us apart is integration with the Mexican ecosystem: CFDI invoicing and stamping with the SAT, payment reconciliation through SPEI, OXXO and Mercado Pago, and automated messaging over WhatsApp Business. When your automation needs a custom piece of software, we develop it with Next.js/React or whatever stack fits best, without locking you into the limits of a single tool.

sections.heading: Related cases and projects
sections.body: We've helped SMBs automate their collections, sending reminders and following up on payments without anyone chasing clients one by one. We've also built CFDI/SAT invoicing flows that generate and send tax documents automatically, and WhatsApp Business support that replies, qualifies and routes conversations to the right team. These are process automations that free up hours for the team and cut errors in tasks that used to be done by hand.
